**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. …
2. …
3. …

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Environment**
- Device / OS:
- Browser + version:
- Installed as a PWA? (yes/no)
- Source in use: file / microphone / system audio

**Console errors**
If you can, open the browser dev tools console and paste any errors.

> Reminder: Resonark is local-first — your vault lives only in your browser.
> Please don't paste any private data you wouldn't want public.
